title: Pestmatic Smart Cockroach Trap x 15, Sticky Strong Glue Cockroach Trap with Food Bait, Roach Indoor Trap, Kraft Eco-Friendly & Natural Catcher for Crawling Insects, Alternative for Cockroach Killer
bullet_points: ♻️ WORKS LIKE A CHARM-- The traps are intended for monitoring the presence of German cockroaches and Oriental cockroaches by capturing them. The package contains an attractant in the form of a tablet which is a blend of food substances. A smell is emitted in order to lure the insects to the glue traps. The strong and long lasting adhesive surface catches cockroaches immediately.

♻️ EASY SET UP- Unfold the insect trap, peel the sticky paper off and place a tablet in the middle of the trap. It's as simple as that! Traps should be located close to places most frequently visited by the insects. These are places where food remains can be found or where the insects can access stored food products, such as kitchen cupboards and bedrooms. Insects also often stay in places where access to water is ensured, e.g. next to water pipes.

♻️ SMART & LONG LASTING- The effective lifetime of the traps is up to 36 months from the manufacture date. When unpacked they will remain active for 30−60 days. A trap's effective performance may be shortened by factors accelerating deactivation of the adhesive surface, such as a high amount of dust in the air.

♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY & BIODEGRADABLE- Our main goal these days is to live in harmony with our environment. Therefore our insect catcher is made 100% out of kraft paper with biodegradable cover dividers. The traps are odourless, recyclable and harmless to humans and pets- TRAPS DO NOT CONTAIN CHEMICAL SUBSTANCES

♻️ PREMIUM QUALITY PRODUCED IN EUROPE- unlike other cockroach traps on the market that are made in China, our Pestmatic trap has been produced in the UK and created based on many years of experience designing the most powerful solutions. The high quality material glue board ensures durability, reliability, effectiveness, and practicality against cockroaches, spiders, ants and other crawling insects. Our cockroach trap will deal with them for you!
